heading: Sharing of medical care facilities and resources
label: 254a Sharing of medical care facilities and resources
notes: Amendments1988—Subsec. (b)(1). inserted “schools of osteopathic medicine,” after “schools of medicine,” and “professions” after “health”.Pub. L. 100–607

children.text: the term “specialized health resources” means health care resources (whether equipment, space, or personnel) which, because of cost, limited availability, or unusual nature, are either unique in the health care community or are subject to maximum utilization only through mutual use;
the term “hospital”, unless otherwise specified, includes (in addition to other hospitals) any Federal hospital.

children.heading: Statement of purpose; agreements or arrangements; reciprocity; reimbursement; credits
children.label: b Statement of purpose; agreements or arrangements; reciprocity; reimbursement; credits

children.text: enter into agreements or arrangements with schools of medicine, schools of osteopathic medicine, and with other health professions schools, agencies, or institutions, for such interchange or cooperative use of facilities and services on a reciprocal or reimbursable basis, as will be of benefit to the training or research programs of the participating agencies; and

enter into agreements or arrangements with hospitals and other health care facilities for the mutual use or the exchange of use of specialized health resources, and providing for reciprocal reimbursement.
